title: MOCO Museum
full_description: MOCO Museum is located in a sprawling mansion on Museumplein, bringing together 20th-century masters — Dalí, Warhol, Keith Haring, Yayoi Kusama — alongside contemporary icons Banksy, Jean-Michel Basquiat, and KAWS. The permanent Banksy exhibition includes original works verified by Pest Control: Girl with Balloon, Laugh Now, Flower Thrower, Smiling Copper, and the Crude Oil series, many from private collections never previously shown publicly.
ai_summary: Museumplein's eclectic art mansion — Banksy originals (verified by Pest Control) next to Dalí, Warhol, Haring, Kusama, and Basquiat, in a beautifully converted canal-side villa that makes modern and street art feel both transgressive and completely at home.
